verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the PM via N-terminal myristoylation/palmitoylation — canonically a cytoplasmic-face signaling kinase downstream of BCR/FcεRI. However, Src-family kinases including LYN are documented as ecto-kinases on the surface of tumor cells (cancer ecto-kinase display), and surface LYN has been reported in certain hematologic malignancy contexts. This non-baseline ecto-pool qualifies as cell-state-induced surface display, even though the dominant pool is inner-leaflet anchored.
predicted_key_uncertainty: Strength of evidence for tumor-cell ecto-LYN display is limited; baseline localization is firmly inner-leaflet cytoplasmic-face.
